articles.title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
articles.summary: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.

articles.title: US to end funding of South Africa's HIV programmes over claims of Afrikaner persecution
articles.summary: The US says South Africa is not doing enough to protect the white-minority Afrikaner community.

articles.title: UK actress charged with importing meth worth almost A$300m into Australia
